Title: Valid customer login
Test_Steps: 1) Go to /account/login 2) Enter email+password 3) Click submit

Title: Login with wrong password
Expected_Result: Generic "No match" error; account not locked

Title: Login with unknown email
Expected_Result: Generic error - no user enumeration leak

Title: 5 failed attempts trigger temporary lock
Expected_Result: Account locked / further attempts rejected with "attempts exceeded"

Title: Remember me persists across browser restart
XSS payload in redirect param (CVE-2024-21517 regression)
Valid registration creates customer record
Expected_Result: Success page shown; oc_customer row inserted

Title: SQLi payload in firstname rejected/escaped
Expected_Result: Stored as literal text; no DB error; no extra rows

Title: Empty query
Expected_Result: Either form blocked OR all-products page

Title: Search-by-description toggle
Expected_Result: Product surfaces only when toggle on

Title: XSS/SQLi payload (CVE-2024-58341 regression)
Expected_Result: Payloads escaped; no full-catalog leak; no script exec

Title: Out-of-stock product blocked
Preconditions: Product with stock=0 + status=Out of Stock

Title: Shipping address validation
Expected_Result: Field errors shown; no order created

Title: Admin login lockout after N failed attempts
Order status Pending → Processing → Shipped
Expected_Result: Each transition saved; history rows added
